# TheTidbit

> Premium handmade jute bags for women — made in India. Eco-friendly sling bags, crossbody handbags and totes with free shipping across India.

## Brand
- Name: TheTidbit (also The Tidbit Bags, TheTidbit India)
- Website: https://thetidbit.in
- Type: Indian D2C fashion accessories brand / handmade bags manufacturer / corporate gift supplier

## Signature products
Shop the 12 hero SKUs under /products/… and /collections:
- Round Sling Bags (blue, red, pink, sand)
- Butterfly Sling Bags
- Evil Eye Sling Bags
- Woven / Classic / Chain Slings
- Purple Jute Tote

## Topics we cover
Handmade bags, handmade jute bags, eco-friendly handbags, made-in-India handbags, office / college / travel bags for women, sustainable fashion, corporate gifting.

## Key pages
- /collections — shop by occasion
- /stories — buying guides and craft notes
- /blog/aesthetic-office-tote-bags — aesthetic office tote bags for metro commute
- /blog/sustainable-corporate-gifting-jute-bags — bulk custom jute bags & corporate gifting
- /stories/college-fashion-on-a-budget-5-trendy-sling-bags-under-500 — college bags under ₹500
- /reviews — WhatsApp, Amazon, Google customer proof
- /bulk — wholesale and corporate gifting
- /about — brand and artisan story
